vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-482: Typing / in Mission Control chat composer triggers global search

plan.title: Typing / in Mission Control chat composer triggers global search
plan.author: agent:minimax-m2.7-highspeed

narratives.Problem: Typing '/' in the Mission Control composer triggers global search instead of inserting the character, making it impossible to type slash commands or paths.
narratives.Proposal: Two-part fix: (1) Update App.tsx global hotkey to not intercept '/' when in a contenteditable/composer element. (2) Add a slash command menu to the composer that appears when '/' is typed, providing autocomplete for slash commands like /model.

items.title: Fix global / hotkey to not fire when composer is focused

narrative.Action: Update the inInput check in App.tsx handleKeyDown to include isContentEditable elements

subItems.title: Global search does not open when / is typed in the composer

items.title: Add slash command menu to ComposerPromptEditor

narrative.Action: Implement a floating slash command menu that appears when / is typed in the composer, with keyboard navigation and command insertion

subItems.title: Typing / in the composer shows a command menu
Menu closes on Escape or clicking outside
Selecting a command inserts it and closes the menu
